articles.title: Former UK Prime Minister Boris Johnson calls on allies to send noncombat troops to Ukraine - PBS
articles.description: Former British Prime Minister Boris Johnson says the U.K. and its European allies should immediately deploy noncombat troops to Ukraine to show Vladimir Putin that Western nations are committed to the nation’s freedom and independence.
articles.content: LONDON (AP) Former British Prime Minister Boris Johnson says the U.K. and its European allies should immediately deploy noncombat troops to Ukraine to show Russian President Vladimir Putin that Weste… [+3265 chars]
